perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a warehouse-style retail environment (Costco), holding large, plush pillows shaped like watermelon, strawberry, lemon, and avocado. They are smiling and gesturing towards the items. (2) Each pillow is featured in a close-up: first the watermelon, followed by the avocado, then the strawberry, and finally the lemon slice. The women rotate and squeeze the pillows to show their volume. (3) One woman points to and opens a hidden zipper on the back of the avocado pillow, revealing a small pocket. They continue to pose with the various pillows until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music starts. A high-pitched female voice speaks enthusiastically, followed by a deeper male voice providing narration. (2) The male narrator describes each fruit pillow as they are shown, maintaining a cheerful and informative tone. Some sound effects (dings/chimes) punctuate the mention of prices or features. (3) The dialogue continues with the female speakers expressing excitement about the '3D' nature and the hidden zipper feature of the pillows. The music remains consistent throughout until a final closing remark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '水果和你說再見' (Fruits say goodbye to you) - Decorative hook. (2) '459元 超划算' (459 yuan, super value) - Functional price information. (3) '超萌四季水果抱枕' (Super cute four-season fruit pillows) - Decorative title. (4) '西瓜' (Watermelon), '酪梨' (Avocado), '草莓' (Strawberry), '檸檬' (Lemon) - Functional labels for the products. (5) '拉鍊' (Zipper) - Functional highlight of a feature. (6) '非常有立體' (Very three-dimensional) - Decorative emphasis on quality.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Individual Product Showcase -> Feature Highlight (Zipper) -> Summary Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 2 passers-by visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black beret and a brown top with a black skirt; the second woman has long dark hair and wears a white textured dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving units, bulk products, shopping carts, and other customers in the distance.

vocal_qualities.pitch: Varied (High for females, Medium-low for male)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product List -> Feature Demo -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review a set of fruit-shaped plush pillows available at Costco, emphasizing their aesthetic appeal, price value, and specific physical features like the hidden zipper and three-dimensional shape.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Display of the Costco logo, specific price points, and direct product recommendation to the audience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and dual-host presentation.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a classic 'finds' or 'must-buy' format common in social media shopping recommendations.
